CustomField.label: Value (Text)
CustomField.description: Text/multi-value form of this configurable tunable, used only when the setting is inherently non-numeric or list-valued and VS_Value__c does not fit (e.g. ReminderOffsetsHours holds a comma-separated list of hour offsets, "24,3", per OQ-005). Left blank on the purely numeric setting records, which use VS_Value__c instead. Consuming Flow/Apex must parse this field's contents (e.g. split on comma) rather than assume a single number.
